outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Trump hints US-Iran talks could resume over next two days
outlets.summary: CNN live coverage of Trump declaring war 'very close to being over.' CENTCOM blockade Day 3. Iran claims $270B losses. Hezbollah fires 30+ rockets at Israel.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth's claims about Iran war contradict reality, officials say
outlets.summary: WaPo investigates Pentagon chief Hegseth's claim that Iran's missile program is 'functionally destroyed.' Officials privately say claims 'contradict reality.' Iran shot down 2 US jets during war.

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: Trump declares Iran war is 'very close to being over'
outlets.summary: Fox Business exclusive interview. Trump tells Bartiromo: 'Their whole navy is under water.' Hints at Round 2 talks in Pakistan 'in next two days.' Ceasefire expires April 21.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Fox News fans turn on Trump as he says Iran war 'is close to over'
outlets.summary: Mirror reports Fox News audience backlash to Trump's optimistic war assessment. Some viewers argue war should continue until Iran's nuclear program is fully dismantled.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump says war 'close to over' as Hormuz blockade continues
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera live coverage: Iran claims $270B losses. Trump 'war close to over.' CENTCOM blockade Day 3. Hezbollah 30+ rockets at Israel. Israel strikes south of Beirut. Pakistan PM diplomatic tour.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: The Hormuz Blockade Is as Much About China as Iran
outlets.summary: Bloomberg analysis: 157.7M barrels of Iranian oil on water, 97.6% China-bound. China calls blockade 'dangerous and irresponsible.' Lavrov arrives Beijing to coordinate response.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: One man injured as Hezbollah fires barrages of more than 40 rockets at northern Israel
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers Hezbollah 30+ rockets hitting Upper/Western Galilee. 1 wounded in Tamra. Israeli drone strikes south of Beirut kill 2. Bint Jbeil: 1 IDF killed, 13 wounded.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israel doesn't know how to live without war, and maybe it doesn't want to
outlets.summary: Haaretz opinion piece questioning Israel's perpetual war footing. Argues Lebanon front continues despite ceasefire. 1-in-4 Iranian missiles penetrated air defenses per Haaretz investigation.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Tehran warns of dangerous repercussions from US provocations in Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Araghchi warning of 'perilous consequences' from US blockade. Pezeshkian: 'force doomed to failure.' Iran claims $270B in war losses.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Hezbollah attacks Israeli military settlements with new optical-guidance drone
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Hezbollah's ongoing drone/rocket attacks on northern Israel. 30+ rockets hit Galilee on April 15. 1 wounded in Tamra.
